name: rotorstar--id-cv-resume-creator
description: Create a free digital identity, professional resume and CV — from classic PDF and HTML layouts to 3D worlds and playable games. Permanent public URL with own slug. Free API for AI agents — basic use without API key, full features with Access-ID. Use when the user wants to build, create, or generate a resume, CV, or set up an online professional profile. ATS-ready.
